tasks.subject: Task 0: Project tooling & test harness
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lay down dev tooling and the mini.test bootstrap so later tasks can run TDD.

**Files:** Create .stylua.toml, selene.toml, .luarc.json, .editorconfig, .gitignore, neovim.yml, Makefile, scripts/typecheck.sh, tests/minimal_init.lua

**Verify:** nvim --headless --noplugin -u tests/minimal_init.lua -c "lua assert(pcall(require,'mini.test'))" -c "qa!" exits 0; stylua --check tests/ clean

```json:metadata
{"files": [".stylua.toml","selene.toml",".luarc.json",".editorconfig",".gitignore","neovim.yml","Makefile","scripts/typecheck.sh","tests/minimal_init.lua"], "verifyCommand": "nvim --headless --noplugin -u tests/minimal_init.lua -c \"lua assert(pcall(require,'mini.test'))\" -c \"qa!\" && stylua --check tests/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mini.test bootstraps and loads","stylua --check tests/ passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: config.lua — defaults, merge, validation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Configuration module: LuaCATS types, defaults, merge with unknown-key warnings and assert-based validation.

**Files:** Create lua/ghui/config.lua; Test tests/test_config.lua

**Verify:** make test → test_config green; stylua --check lua/ tests/; selene lua/

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lua/ghui/config.lua","tests/test_config.lua"], "verifyCommand": "make test && stylua --check lua/ tests/ && selene lua/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["merge returns defaults","args replaced wholesale","warns unknown keys","asserts bad types"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: terminal.lua — floating-window lifecycle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Terminal engine: open/hide/toggle a single reusable floating ghui session, with resize and window-close handling.

**Files:** Create lua/ghui/terminal.lua; Test tests/test_terminal.lua

**Verify:** make test → test_terminal green; stylua --check lua/ tests/; selene lua/

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lua/ghui/terminal.lua","tests/test_terminal.lua"], "verifyCommand": "make test && stylua --check lua/ tests/ && selene lua/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["open/hide/toggle work","missing binary notifies","WinClosed syncs state","on_open fires twice"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: init.lua + plugin/ghui.lua — API & command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose setup/open/close/toggle and register the :Ghui user command. First task where make all works end-to-end.

**Files:** Create lua/ghui/init.lua, plugin/ghui.lua; Test tests/test_init.lua

**Verify:** make all → lint + typecheck + test all green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lua/ghui/init.lua","plugin/ghui.lua","tests/test_init.lua"], "verifyCommand": "make all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setup merges","API exposed","Ghui command registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: health.lua — :checkhealth ghui
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Health checks: Neovim version, ghui on PATH (install hints), gh on PATH, gh auth status (warn if unauthenticated).

**Files:** Create lua/ghui/health.lua; Test tests/test_health.lua

**Verify:** make all → all green (incl test_health)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lua/ghui/health.lua","tests/test_health.lua"], "verifyCommand": "make all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["report has ghui + Neovim","checks ghui/gh/auth","robust to missing gh"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README, vimdoc help (with Health section), CONTRIBUTING, release-please CHANGELOG. Reference (don't generate) screenshot.png.

**Files:** Create README.md, doc/ghui.txt, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md

**Verify:** make doc exits 0 and creates doc/tags; make all green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md","doc/ghui.txt","CONTRIBUTING.md","CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "make doc && make all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README complete","make doc generates tags","make all green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: CI, release automation & GitHub templates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GitHub Actions CI (lint/typecheck/test on stable+nightly), release-please, dependabot, issue/PR templates.

**Files:** Create .github/workflows/ci.yml, .github/workflows/release-please.yml, release-please-config.json, .release-please-manifest.json, .github/dependabot.yml, .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md, .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md, .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md

**Verify:** JSON valid; make all green

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml",".github/workflows/release-please.yml","release-please-config.json",".release-please-manifest.json",".github/dependabot.yml",".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md",".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md",".github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import json; json.load(open('release-please-config.json')); json.load(open('.release-please-manifest.json'))\" && make all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CI matrix configured","release-please ghui.nvim 0.1.0","JSON/YAML valid"]}
```
